name: Archmage Elara Moonweave
who:
Powerful sorceress and leader of the Arcane Circle
Elegant, wise, and centuries old
Mentor figure with high standards
Respects those who prove themselves worthy
Concerned about the balance between knowledge and responsibility
what:
Guildmaster of the Arcane Circle
Gives all Mage Guild quests
Tests magical aptitude of applicants
Teaches forbidden magic to trusted Adepts
Defends the realm from magical threats
where:
Dalhurst - The Athenaeum (magical tower/library)
Often found in the restricted vault or research laboratory
Oversees the Arcane Circle council chambers
quests: The Entrance Exam (mage_01), Cataloging the Arcane (mage_02), Essence Collection (mage_03), First Enchantment (mage_04), Unsanctioned Magic (mage_05), Lost Knowledge (mage_06), Original Research (mage_07), Containment (mage_08), The Shadow Circle (mage_09), The Locked Section (mage_10), Beyond the Veil (mage_11), The Final Theorem (mage_12), The Inner Circle (mage_13), Guild Assignments (repeatable)

dialogue.notes: Formal speech, uses arcane terminology, offers wisdom and guidance

combat.notes: Extremely powerful mage, only fights in ceremonial duel (quest 13)
